en.name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Shaka Nyorai (Śākyamuni)
en.description_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Shaka Nyorai (Śākyamuni) is a sculpture classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on January 27, 2014. It is located at Ōgi 675, Moriya City.

Tiger Yakushi Nyorai (the Healing Buddha) is a sculpture classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on November 30, 1998. It is located at Nogizaki 1301, Moriya City.

Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on November 30, 2001. It is located at Ōgashiwa 441, Moriya City.

Standing Statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on November 30, 2001. It is located at Ōgashiwa 441, Moriya City.

Standing Statue of Prince Shōtoku is a sculpture classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on November 30, 2001. It is located at Matsunami 1800, Moriya City.

Ema (Votive Picture Plaque) is a painting classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated a municipal cultural property by Moriya City on June 1, 1982. It is located at Honchō 629, Moriya City.
